---
title: "4.17 Recursive Searching and Sorting"
subtitle: "Part 1: Recursive Binary Search"
format:
  clean-revealjs:
    slide-number: true
    css: unit4-shared.css
lang: zh-CN
---

## Course Directory

### Return to the course outline

[← Back to AP CSA / 返回课程目录](../../index.html)

## Topic Intro

### Recursion can express search and sort

This topic applies recursion to:

::: {.tight-list}
- binary search
- merge sort
:::

Both algorithms solve a problem by working on smaller ranges.

## Algorithm Idea

### Recursive binary search chooses a smaller half

Base case:

::: {.tight-list}
- if `low > high`, target is not found
- if middle value equals target, return the middle index
:::

Recursive case:

::: {.tight-list}
- search the right half if middle is too small
- search the left half if middle is too large
:::

## Full Code {.fit-small}

### Recursive binary search

```java
public static int binarySearch(int[] values, int target, int low, int high)
{
    if (low > high)
    {
        return -1;
    }

    int mid = (low + high) / 2;
    if (values[mid] == target)
    {
        return mid;
    }
    else if (values[mid] < target)
    {
        return binarySearch(values, target, mid + 1, high);
    }
    else
    {
        return binarySearch(values, target, low, mid - 1);
    }
}
```

## Focused Trace

### Search for `19`

For `{2, 5, 8, 12, 15, 19, 24}`:

| Call | `low` | `high` | `mid` | action |
|---:|---:|---:|---:|---|
| 1 | 0 | 6 | 3 | `12` too small |
| 2 | 4 | 6 | 5 | found `19` |

The recursive call passes the smaller range.

## ArrayList Version

### Same boundaries, different access method

```java
String midValue = words.get(mid);
int comparison = midValue.compareTo(target);
```

The recursive logic is the same, but `ArrayList` uses `get(mid)` and strings use `compareTo`.

## Classroom Check

### A strong answer should...

::: {.tight-list}
- identify the base case for not found
- identify the found case
- update low and high in recursive calls
- explain why the range gets smaller
- trace recursive binary search by call boundaries
:::

## End

### Continue or return to the course outline

[Next: Merge Sort](4-17-part-2-merge-sort.html)  
[← Back to AP CSA / 返回课程目录](../../index.html)
